content.body:
The [Amsterdam Plenary meeting in May](https://github.com/tc39/Reflector/issues/578) is now full with 40 people signed-up for in-person attendance 💥

- If you signed up and **do not plan to attend**, please contact one of the chairs so that we can remove you and give your spot to someone else.
- If **you wish to attend** and have not registered yet, you can still use the same Google form to enter the waitlist but your place will not be confirmed until you hear from Dmitry Makhnev.
content.formatted_body:
The Amsterdam Plenary meeting in May is now full with 40 people signed-up for in-person attendance 💥

  • If you signed up and do not plan to attend, please contact one of the chairs so that we can remove you and give your spot to someone else.
  • If you wish to attend and have not registered yet, you can still use the same Google form to enter the waitlist but your place will not be confirmed until you hear from Dmitry Makhnev.
